# ACRY AI

> India's #1 AI Second Brain for exam preparation. Predicts what you'll forget, builds a personalized study plan, and pushes your rank up every day.

ACRY AI helps students cracking UPSC, NEET, JEE, CAT, SSC, GATE and other competitive exams with adaptive spaced repetition, rank prediction, and an AI tutor.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the AI Second Brain platform.
- [About](/about): Mission, team and how the AI brain works.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the ACRY AI team.
- [MyRank](/myrank): Free AI rank-prediction test for competitive exams.
- [Community](/community): Topper community, discussions and study circles.
- [Sign In](/auth): Log in or sign up with passwordless OTP.
- [Institute Login](/institute/login): Coaching institute admin portal.
- [Institute Signup](/institute/signup): Onboard a coaching institute.
